name: Braised Spicy Eggplant
recipeIngredient: 1 tsp Dried chile bean sauce (or 1 dried red chile)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the eggplants into cubes, either using Chinese eggplant or regular large varieties trimmed and cut into 1-inch pieces.
2. Sprinkle the eggplant cubes with salt and let them drain in a sieve for 20 minutes. Rinse under cold running water and pat dry with paper towels.
3. Heat oil in a wok or large skillet to medium heat.
4. Add the eggplant, garlic, ginger, and scallions; stir-fry for about one minute until well mixed.
5. Add the remaining ingredients except chopped scallions.
6. Reduce heat and cook, uncovered, for 10 to 15 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the eggplant is tender.
7. Return heat to high and continue stirring until the liquid reduces slightly and thickens.
8. Transfer mixture to serving dish and garnish with chopped scallion tops.
